videoSnippet.title: "There are Levels to This" || Dubov vs Sindarov (Winner vs Secret Boss!) || Chess.com Open 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Dubov, Daniil (2746) - Nihal Sarin (2802) 
2026 Chess.com Open (Chess.com) [02-05] 2026.04.23
C45 Scotch game

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.d4 exd4 4.Nxd4 Bb4+ 5.c3 Bc5 6.Nb3 Bb6 7.c4 d6 8.Nc3 Nge7 9.Be2 O-O 10.O-O f5 11.Bg5 h6 12.Bxe7 Qxe7 13.Nd5 Qe5 14.exf5 Bxf5 15.Qd2 Be6 16.Nxb6 axb6 17.Rae1 Qf4 18.Qc3 Rxa2 19.Bd3 Qf6 20.Qc1 Ne5 21.Bb1 Rxb2 22.Nd4 Rxb1 23.Qxb1 Bxc4 24.Ne2 b5 25.f4 Nd3 26.Rd1 Re8 27.Rd2 Nc5 28.Re1 Qe6 29.Kf1 Qe3 30.Qg6 Re6
